printed.name: Side Over Prep
printed.setup: Standing sideways to Ladder Barrel, pelvis against barrel, feet braced against bottom of ladder, inside leg in front, body on diagonal line, hands placed behind head, fingers loosely interlaced

movement.exhale: Straighten and lift trunk, return to start position

cues: Start and end with trunk and leg on diagonal line
Maintain co-contraction of abdominals and back extensors
Imagine moving between two panes of glass
